caption: The video features a man seated on stage, playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. He is dressed in a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate blue embroidery. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows behind him. The audience, visible in the foreground, is attentively watching and listening to his performance. The man seems focused and engaged as he strums the guitar and sings, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, suggesting that this event may be associated with or sponsored by an organization with that name.
